title: Movement-stick square deadzone (aim stick already radial) (M2.1)

history.note: Landed a48c12a (fix(input): M2.1 radial deadzone + rescale for movement stick via platformApplyRadialDeadzone). NOT verified: gamepad mapping only runs when g_gameController!=NULL, so headless deterministic routes bypass it — sim_state_hash (green at landing) cannot regress-guard it. Needs a dedicated input-mapping fidelity lane (Input.GamepadRadialDeadzone on/off diagonal-creep assertion).

Regression lane tests/test_radial_deadzone.c (ctest radial_deadzone) drives the pure radial_deadzone.c TU shared by aim+movement sticks: below-deadzone->0, diagonal (6000,6000) radial->(7,-7) nonzero, full deflection->80, movement map==shared helper. Fail-on-revert proven: forcing movement stick to per-axis square collapses the diagonal to (0,0), 7 checks red; restored->green. ge007 builds clean; sim_state_hash unchanged. Committed 82b0a4f.
